---
applyTo: "tracker/**/*,.github/workflows/**/*.tracker.yml"
---

use express with typescript
use contract based design generated by heyapi
use function signature instead of const () => {} for better type inference
use types instead of interfaces where possible for better type inference and easier refactoring
use pnpm as the package manager and always `pnpm run lint` and `pnpm run build` to verify working code
always work in the /tracker directory
